name: localcode-optimizer-ide
description: AI-powered Python code reviewer — triggers the ADK 2.0 Gemini agent on every file save.

localcode-optimizer.agentWorkingDir.description: Absolute path to the localcode-optimizer ADK project directory.

localcode-optimizer.uvPath.description: Path to the uv executable (use full path if not on system PATH).

localcode-optimizer.primaryEngine.description: Preferred AI engine for code reviews. 'Gemini' uses the ADK/Gemini cloud agent (with Ollama as automatic fallback). 'Ollama' bypasses the cloud entirely and always uses the local model.

localcode-optimizer.ollamaModelName.description: Ollama model to use for local reviews (e.g. 'qwen2.5-coder:0.5b', 'codellama:7b', 'deepseek-coder:6.7b'). Must be pulled with 'ollama pull <model>' before use.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
